data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifying choices enhances decision-making speed for users on the platform.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes structured navigation menus to minimize user effort in finding products.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design elements are optimized for ease of access and interaction.
data.technical_spec: Larger clickable areas and strategic positioning of call-to-action buttons.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Leveraging users' existing mental models by maintaining familiar browsing experiences.
data.technical_spec: Consistent user interface that aligns with standard e-commerce site practices.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: An aesthetically pleasing design is perceived to be easier to use.
data.technical_spec: Employs modern, clean design elements that enhance visual engagement.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Grouped related elements together to streamline user flow and comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Effective use of spacing and grouping in product listings and site navigation.
